news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

holdings.infoBox: JEMA is an equity ETF with a total of 522 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.66%, Samsung Electronics at 9.59%, SK hynix at 6.07%, Tencent Holdings at 3.45%, and JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM at 3.07%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan ActiveBuilders Emerging Markets Equity ETF (JEMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund utilizing emerging market equity strategies across countries, regions, styles, and market capitalizations. JEMA was launched on Mar 10, 2021 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...
